name: founder-os
description: An operating system for owners running on Claude Code. 84 skills, 35 commands, invisible version control (say "save my work", "what changed", "undo to before this morning", "back this up" and the OS wraps git for you), on-demand liveness reads (/strategic-read for a 5-section state-of-the-OS report, /log-reply for thread ingest, /since-last-session for the delta since the marker), brand voice layer (operator voice + per-brand voice for multi-brand ecosystems), campaign-from-theme with funnel gating, review-responder for incoming customer messages, execution queue with 3-item ACTIVE cap, substrate health check, persistent memory, decision tracking, six role modes, structured cadence, voice and brand profiles, knowledge notes, stable entry IDs, token-aware progressive query, opt-in observation log, weekly observation rollup, private-tag exclusion filter, graph query, audit report, readiness check, source ingest, wiki lint, wiki graph builder, approval gates, delivery ship checks, legal reference layer, runtime brain snapshot, brain-pass synthesis, today brief wrapper, and a natural-language menu of capabilities tailored to current state. Talk to Claude in plain English or run /founder-os:setup to get started.
